name: whatsapp-mcp
description: Connect Claude to your personal WhatsApp account — read messages, search contacts, and send messages or media.

tools.name: search_contacts
tools.description: Search WhatsApp contacts by name or phone number

tools.name: list_messages
tools.description: Get WhatsApp messages with optional filters and context

tools.name: get_chat
tools.description: Get metadata for a specific chat

tools.name: get_direct_chat_by_contact
tools.description: Find a direct chat by phone number

tools.name: get_contact_chats
tools.description: List all chats involving a contact

tools.name: get_last_interaction
tools.description: Get the most recent message with a contact

tools.name: get_message_context
tools.description: Get surrounding messages around a specific message

tools.name: send_file
tools.description: Send an image, video, document, or raw audio via WhatsApp

tools.name: send_audio_message
tools.description: Send an audio file as a WhatsApp voice message

tools.name: download_media
tools.description: Download media from a WhatsApp message

tools.name: get_setup_instructions
tools.description: Get QR-code authentication instructions for first-time setup
